primary_accounting_issue: Whether intragroup dividend receivables can be designated as hedged items for foreign exchange risk under hedge accounting at the consolidated level

primary_authority.reason: Paragraph 6.3.5 establishes that only items with external parties can be designated as hedged items, while paragraph 6.3.6 provides a narrow exception for intragroup monetary items with foreign currency risk that is not fully eliminated on consolidation

supporting_authority.reason: Clarifies the scope of eligible hedging instruments and provides guidance on foreign currency risk hedging in group structures, including limitations on applying hedge accounting to intragroup items in consolidated financial statements

Governs when foreign exchange differences on intragroup monetary items are eliminated on consolidation versus when they affect consolidated profit or loss, which determines applicability of the paragraph 6.3.6 exception

peripheral_authority.reason: Addresses measurement and recognition of dividend payables but does not govern hedge accounting eligibility or foreign exchange risk treatment
Addresses equity versus liability classification of financial instruments but is not relevant to hedge accounting for foreign exchange risk on intragroup dividends
Governs classification of financial instruments as equity or liability but does not address hedge accounting eligibility for intragroup items

treatment_families.family: Eligibility of intragroup items as hedged items for hedge accounting
Recognition of foreign exchange gains or losses on intragroup monetary items in consolidated financial statements

approaches.label: Hedge accounting eligible - intragroup monetary item exception applies
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: Under IFRS 9 paragraph 6.3.6, foreign currency risk of intragroup monetary items may qualify as a hedged item if the FX gains or losses are not fully eliminated on consolidation, which could include intragroup dividend receivables when the entities have different functional currencies

approaches.label: Hedge accounting ineligible - external party requirement not met
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: Under IFRS 9 paragraph 6.3.5, only items with external parties can be designated as hedged items; intragroup dividend receivables do not qualify, and the paragraph 6.3.6 exception does not apply when FX differences are fully eliminated on consolidation
